overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk-style game, walking through a neon-lit commercial lounge and transitioning into a grand atrium with digital floor displays and massive video screens. The environment features high-end graphics with detailed character models and reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic lounge with bar and vending machines

person in green pants standing near the vending machines

glass-walled seating area with couches and people sitting inside

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a futuristic commercial lounge with dark walls and neon accents. Several NPCs are scattered throughout the space, including a man in a white shirt near the seating area and another person by the vending machines. The environment features 'NICOLA' branded vending machines, digital advertisement pillars, and a bar counter in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand atrium with digital floor displays and massive video screens

events.description: exits the dark lounge through a glass doorway into a vast, brightly lit atrium with soaring ceilings

agents.ego_description: proceeding straight through the expansive atrium, passing by illuminated floor panels and large digital displays

notable_agents.action: person in red hat sitting on bench along the marble wall

entered.detail: long rectangular panels embedded in the floor showing rotating digital advertisements and graphics
giant curved digital screen displaying advertisements high on the wall
set of elevator doors with glowing green circular indicators
large planter containing mature trees with circular seating around the base
tall walls with dark marble texture and integrated linear lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the lounge into a magnificent futuristic atrium with soaring ceilings and polished marble floors. Long illuminated digital displays are embedded in the floor, showing advertisements, while massive curved video screens cover the walls. The space is sparsely populated with a few pedestrians walking or sitting on benches, and features elevator banks and indoor landscaping with trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an intimate, neon-lit commercial lounge into a vast, soaring futuristic atrium. It begins by navigating through a dimly lit space characterized by dark walls and vibrant neon accents, passing by NPCs near seating areas and NICOLA branded vending machines. As the camera moves past digital advertisement pillars and a distant bar counter, the enclosed environment suddenly opens up into a magnificent hall with polished marble floors and towering ceilings. The scene then expands to reveal long illuminated digital displays embedded in the ground and massive curved video screens covering the walls, while the perspective glides past indoor landscaping and elevator banks.
